title: Welcome
text:
I’m a Computer Science and GIS student with interests in machine learning and geospatial analysis in civic and social applications. This website is for EPPS 6323 - Knowledge Mining, where I’ll be sharing: Course reflections, Projects, and Research.
Stay tuned!
